Walkscape Walkthrough

Tip of the day
The base chance to find FINE materials is 1/100, which you can increase with better gear and tools.

Shovel axe

From Walkscape Walkthrough

Other languages:

Shovel axe
Rarity:
Type: Loot
Slot: Tools
Value: 160
Search
Keyword: 		Mining
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

An indispensable companion for adventurers who seek to unearth secrets buried beneath the surface and defend against the perils that may arise.

The Shovel axe item is a loot item.

Requirement

  • At least Mining lvl. 42.

Attributes

+12% Work efficiency While doing Mining.
+9% Chest finding While doing Mining.
+21% Fine material finding While doing Mining.
+5% Chance to find 1 Bird nest While doing Mining.

Uses

Mysterious Merchant

Shop Name Payment
Mysterious Merchant 200

Sources

Chest Drops

Chest Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Chest)† 		Odds
Mining chest 1 0.100% 0.399% ~1 in 251

†Note: Chests roll for loot multiple times.

Mysterious Merchant

Shop Name Price
Mysterious Merchant 800

Guides

No guides exists yet. You can help make one.

Gear Sets

No gear sets exist yet. You can help make one.

Trivia

  • One of the first reported Legendary Items found by players in the game.


This page is updated automatically to reflect information in the current game version.
